name: Intercom
tagline: Customer service platform powered by AI
description: Intercom is an AI-first customer service platform combining live chat, help desk, and proactive support. Used by thousands of SaaS companies to handle support, onboarding, and customer engagement.
use_cases: You want an AI agent (Fin) that can resolve a significant share of support conversations automatically before a human needs to step in
Your SaaS product needs in-app messaging for onboarding sequences, feature announcements, and proactive support — not just reactive ticketing
Your support team handles high-volume live chat and needs smart routing, shared inboxes, and workflow automation to manage it efficiently
You want product tours, checklists, and targeted messages that trigger based on what users do inside your app to improve activation
